summary: Homepage Copy & CTA Upgrade + Admin Sidebar Navigation Testing Complete - All 12 test cases PASSED. Verified: (1) Dashboard hero section loads with story and 'Watch & Continue' as primary CTA button, (2) Dashboard create bar placeholder shows 'What happens next? Continue any story or start fresh...', (3) Dashboard create bar has white 'Go' button (not gradient 'Create'), (4) Dashboard row titled 'Trending Now' is visible, (5) Dashboard row titled 'Unfinished Worlds' is visible (not 'Fresh Stories'), (6) Dashboard row titled 'Continue Watching' is visible when video stories exist (not 'Watch Now'), (7) Story cards show 'See what happens' CTA text, (8) Quick tools pills are visible but subtle (text-white/20 opacity), (9) Admin sidebar persists when navigating from /app/admin to /app/admin/security, (10) Admin sidebar 'Security Dashboard' link navigates correctly and highlights active, (11) Admin dashboard has slim toolbar with 'Executive Dashboard' title (no duplicate nav links), (12) No duplicate 'Back to Admin' buttons in content areas.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 403 error - not critical for sidebar or dashboard functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js correctly implements continuation-focused copy: 'Watch & Continue' hero CTA, 'What happens next?' create bar placeholder, white 'Go' button
Row titles correctly renamed: 'Trending Now', 'Unfinished Worlds' (was Fresh Stories), 'Continue Watching' (was Watch Now)
Story cards show 'See what happens' for real stories and 'Continue this' for seed cards - both continuation-focused
Quick tools pills have subtle styling with text-white/20 and border-white/[0.04] - intentionally low visibility
AdminLayout.js correctly implements persistent sidebar with nested routes via <Outlet />
Admin dashboard has slim toolbar with 'Executive Dashboard' title - no duplicate navigation links in content area
Active state highlighting works correctly using location.pathname matching with indigo styling
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account with 59+ stories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 Admin Sidebar Navigation and P1 Homepage Copy & CTA Upgrade features fully verified. Dashboard shows continuation-focused copy throughout. Admin sidebar persists across all admin page navigations. All row titles correctly renamed. Story cards show 'See what happens' CTA. Quick tools are intentionally subtle (20% opacity).

hero_watch_continue_cta.details: Hero section has 'Watch & Continue' button as primary CTA with white bg and black text

create_bar_placeholder.details: Create bar placeholder is 'What happens next? Continue any story or start fresh...'

create_bar_go_button.details: Create bar has white 'Go' button (bg-white class) instead of gradient 'Create'

trending_now_row.details: Row titled 'Trending Now' is visible with Flame icon

unfinished_worlds_row.details: Row titled 'Unfinished Worlds' is visible (renamed from 'Fresh Stories') with Sparkles icon

continue_watching_row.details: Row titled 'Continue Watching' is visible (renamed from 'Watch Now') with Play icon

story_cards_see_what_happens.details: Story cards show 'See what happens' CTA text for real stories, 'Continue this' for seed cards

quick_tools_subtle.details: Quick tools pills have subtle styling with text-white/20 and border-white/[0.04]

admin_sidebar_persistence.details: Admin sidebar persists when navigating from /app/admin to /app/admin/security and back

security_dashboard_navigation.details: Security Dashboard link navigates correctly to /app/admin/security and highlights as active

executive_dashboard_title.details: Admin dashboard has slim toolbar with 'Executive Dashboard' title

no_duplicate_nav_links.details: No duplicate 'Back to Admin' or navigation links in admin content areas
